title: Base64 Encoder Decoder
desc: Instantly encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to readable text. Supports UTF-8, Unicode, and URL-safe formats with local processing for privacy.

title: Data Masker
desc: Protect sensitive information by automatically masking emails, phone numbers, credit cards, SSNs, and IP addresses. Securely anonymize PII before sharing documents or logs.

title: JWT Decoder
desc: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens locally in your browser. View headers, payloads, and standard claims like exp and iat. Tokens never leave your device for maximum privacy and security.

title: URL Encode Decode
desc: Instantly encode or decode strings for URLs. Supports standard and component encoding, handles UTF-8, query strings, and form data with real-time conversion.
